title: Thyrsanthema pumila
intro: There is not enough information available on the plant Thyrsanthema pumila.
taxonomy: Thyrsanthema pumila is a species of flowering plant in the family Xanthorrhoeaceae. It is native to Western Australia. The plant is classified as a synonym of Calectasia pumila, and it is also sometimes referred to as a Calectasia species. This classification can be confusing as both names have been used interchangeably in the past. The plant's classification is an example of the complexities of botanical nomenclature.
benefits: Unfortunately, I don't have information on the health benefits of Thyrsanthema pumila.

However, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential uses. If used, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, infusions, or other forms of herbal medicine.
